summary: Anthony Acocella, Senior Legislative Affairs Advisor for FLETC, speaks direct-to-camera against a blue curtain with a name plate and subtitles, intercut with informational text-card slides on FLETC's human-trafficking training focus. A static, speech-driven institutional explainer with no music or genre spectacle. Out of scope for youth-appeal produced content.
notable_text: Lower third 'ANTHONY ACOCELLA, SENIOR LEGISLATIVE AFFAIRS ADVISOR, FLETC'; slide 'FLETC's Educational Focus: Defining Human Trafficking / Highlighting Primary Indicators / Victim-Centered Approach / History of Human Trafficking Law'; hotline 1-866-347-2423
